\tzpentry{ID4445}{Connection Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4445 introduces Connection Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\mathcal{A}_{i \alpha} = \exp\left( -\frac{\|\mathbf{p}_i - \Pi(V_\alpha)\|^2}{2\sigma_T^2} \right) \cdot \chi_T, \quad i \in \{1 \dots 153,600\}, \alpha \in \{1 \dots 16\}$$
